note: The labeled exemplar set rubric-check.py runs the pattern-quality gate (bin/pattern-check.py) against, to PROVE the gate discriminates. One gate-clean pattern (a context + transferable solution shape + consequences + two ledger refs + a refutation condition) the gate must PASS, and three planted defects it must REJECT — each removing exactly one load-bearing property (provenance, falsifiability, structured shape). A hollow gate that waved any of these through would FAIL this meta-verification.
